porch.//: Implement-phase checks (config > protocol; survives codev updates). build: no analog. tests: validator pytest (always), THEN multibrowser vitest ONLY when its node_modules is present in this worktree — guarded with if/then/else so Python-only builders (who get apps/multibrowser source but not its gitignored node_modules after rebasing main) SKIP it gracefully instead of failing porch done. NB: an A&&B||C guard would mask vitest failures when deps ARE present, so if/then/else is used.

tests.command: uv --project apps/tradition_validator run pytest && if [ -d apps/multibrowser/node_modules ]; then pnpm -C apps/multibrowser test; else echo 'multibrowser vitest skipped (no node_modules in this worktree)'; fi

consultation.//: Drop the blind Gemini reviewer from per-phase consults: its impl/code-review sandbox can't see the worktree (no VERDICT -> parsed REQUEST_CHANGES). Codex+Claude review the real code; architect runs a full 3-way integration CMAP at the PR gate (diff fed inline, where Gemini works). Global (also applies to the review phase).

worktree.//: Opt-in runnable worktree config. See CLAUDE.md > Runnable Worktrees for stack-specific recipes (pnpm, npm, yarn, bun, cargo, poetry/uv, go mod). Defaults shown below are no-ops; fill in to enable.
